---
title: "Text as Data: tidytext (todo)"
---

{{< include ../_extensions/r-wasm/live/_knitr.qmd >}}
{{< include ../_extensions/r-wasm/live/_gradethis.qmd >}}

::: {.callout-note}
**Proposed chapter scope:** Rule- and dictionary-based text analysis with `tidytext`. Covers tokenization, word frequencies, TF-IDF, and sentiment analysis. Deliberately stays at the interpretable/rule-based level — embeddings and statistical/ML approaches are in Part III.
:::
